visual_description: A woman with blonde, curly hair, wearing a dark cardigan over a white collared shirt, sits at a table in a restaurant. She looks towards the right of the frame with a neutral expression. A man with dark, curly hair and a beard, wearing a patterned sweater, is seated across from her and looks at her with a slight smile.
